cards.title: Startup, Resume, and Recovery Shell

fields.Current note: Refined in `1f62d11` after operator feedback. Actual app smoke pass: first screen now shows Open Existing Job, Start New Job, and recovery only when interrupted state exists; Existing Job routes through a picker into Setup Mode; New Job now includes save folder and PTGui template selection. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Operator visual signoff on revised startup/new-job flow, then verify archive/ignore recovery once a real crash state is present.

cards.summary: Refined in `1f62d11` after operator feedback. Actual app smoke pass: first screen now shows Open Existing Job, Start New Job, and recovery only when interrupted state exists; Existing Job routes through a picker into Setup Mode; New Job now includes save folder and PTGui template selection. `swift build` passed. Operator visual signoff on revised startup/new-job flow, then verify archive/ignore recovery once a real crash state is present.

cards.title: Setup Mode and Working Mode Gate

fields.Current note: Implemented in `35cf7cb`; app smoke-verified 2026-05-30. Existing job opens Setup Mode, warning acknowledgement is shown for non-green readiness, and Enter Working Mode launches the Operator Console on existing-footage playback.
fields.Next action: Operator signoff on visual treatment across all active windows; then use as dependency for Operator Console and mapping work.

cards.summary: Implemented in `35cf7cb`; app smoke-verified 2026-05-30. Existing job opens Setup Mode, warning acknowledgement is shown for non-green readiness, and Enter Working Mode launches the Operator Console on existing-footage playback. Operator signoff on visual treatment across all active windows; then use as dependency for Operator Console and mapping work.

cards.title: Operator Console Readiness Dashboard

fields.Current note: Initial OC shell implemented in `1994477`; `swift build` passed and actual app smoke pass rendered the OC. Adds Operator Console terminology, Working Mode/source/alarm header pills, module tabs, job/project context, readiness cards with green/yellow states, embedded previews, source telemetry, and existing REC controls.
fields.Next action: Operator/design review for layout clarity and module terminology before deeper OC modules are accepted.

cards.summary: Initial OC shell implemented in `1994477`; `swift build` passed and actual app smoke pass rendered the OC. cards.title: Default PTGui Template and Active Calibration Lifecycle

fields.Current note: Core artifact path app-verified 2026-05-30. Launch copied active PTGui to `_CALIBRATION/calibration_1bb8cd94.pts`; `manifest.json` records project-local template path and SHA-256; fresh `take_007` sidecar records project-level and take-level `calibrationTemplate`.
fields.Next action: Operator test import/replace in Setup Mode and between takes, plus disabled-during-recording lock.

cards.summary: Core artifact path app-verified 2026-05-30. Launch copied active PTGui to `_CALIBRATION/calibration_1bb8cd94.pts`; `manifest.json` records project-local template path and SHA-256; fresh `take_007` sidecar records project-level and take-level `calibrationTemplate`. Operator test import/replace in Setup Mode and between takes, plus disabled-during-recording lock.

cards.title: 9-Grid and PTGui Mapping Verification

fields.Current note: Initial mapping module implemented in `a41c49d`; `swift build` passed and actual app smoke pass rendered the Cameras tab. It shows SDI/playback source, 9-grid cell, OCR ID, Pinwheel position, PTGui slot, expected Live Stitch ID, status, standard-template indicator, and side-by-side 9-grid/stitch previews. Job/manifest now persist the template mapping override state.
fields.Next action: Operator/hardware review on the live array, then add the advanced override editing flow if a nonstandard PTGui template is encountered.

cards.summary: Initial mapping module implemented in `a41c49d`; `swift build` passed and actual app smoke pass rendered the Cameras tab. It shows SDI/playback source, 9-grid cell, OCR ID, Pinwheel position, PTGui slot, expected Live Stitch ID, status, standard-template indicator, and side-by-side 9-grid/stitch previews. Job/manifest now persist the template mapping override state. Operator/hardware review on the live array, then add the advanced override editing flow if a nonstandard PTGui template is encountered.

cards.title: ROI Profile Store and Overlay Verification Roll

fields.Current note: Initial shell landed in `ae1bc2e`; close-loop landed in `9cefa66`. Overlay/QC now has context-keyed ROI fallback, fast/full verification actions, VisualAnalyzer ROI injection, repo-local DB resolution, 9/9 REC observation, majority roll/clip advance observation, and pass-state persistence. `swift build` passed; app smoke pass verified startup through Overlay/QC on existing footage.
fields.Next action: Live-array verification: confirm Fast Test passes after a forced roll/clip advance, Full Test requires stop after REC, and stale/missing ROI stays yellow/non-blocking.

cards.summary: Initial shell landed in `ae1bc2e`; close-loop landed in `9cefa66`. Overlay/QC now has context-keyed ROI fallback, fast/full verification actions, VisualAnalyzer ROI injection, repo-local DB resolution, 9/9 REC observation, majority roll/clip advance observation, and pass-state persistence. `swift build` passed; app smoke pass verified startup through Overlay/QC on existing footage. Live-array verification: confirm Fast Test passes after a forced roll/clip advance, Full Test requires stop after REC, and stale/missing ROI stays yellow/non-blocking.

cards.title: 500 ms REC Consensus and Recording Classification

fields.Current note: Implemented in `feee6fa` after the 500 ms tolerance change in `9cefa66`; SDI dropout grace landed in `e6a5ca0`. Partial REC states that persist past 500 ms now start recording before posting per-camera CAMERA_FAILED_TO_RECORD or CAMERA_RECORDED_ALONE events. Missing SDI signal is handled separately with a 1s debounce and does not stop recording or create loud alarm spam. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Live-array verification across 9/9, 8/9, 1/9, 5/4 split, and bump/dropout patterns; confirm event log, sidecar flags, Operator Console REC state, and folder sorting remain coherent.

cards.summary: Implemented in `feee6fa` after the 500 ms tolerance change in `9cefa66`; SDI dropout grace landed in `e6a5ca0`. Partial REC states that persist past 500 ms now start recording before posting per-camera CAMERA_FAILED_TO_RECORD or CAMERA_RECORDED_ALONE events. Missing SDI signal is handled separately with a 1s debounce and does not stop recording or create loud alarm spam. `swift build` passed. Live-array verification across 9/9, 8/9, 1/9, 5/4 split, and bump/dropout patterns; confirm event log, sidecar flags, Operator Console REC state, and folder sorting remain coherent.

cards.title: Take Lifecycle Sorting, Sidecars, and Manifest Rollup

fields.Current note: Core lifecycle routing landed in `6d8340a`. Closed takes now get explicit `takeClassification` and `classificationReason`; critical REC consensus flags route to `qc_fail/`; false-roll flags route to `false_roll/`; warning-only issues such as SDI dropout remain in `takes/` with QC metadata. Sidecar filenames now follow the final folder name, clip-level QC flags are populated, and manifest rollup scans all sort folders. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Hardware/OCR validation: record 9/9, 8/9, 1/9, and middle partial patterns, then inspect folder placement, per-take `data.json`, and `manifest.json`. False-roll routing still needs the operator action from card 13.

cards.summary: Core lifecycle routing landed in `6d8340a`. Closed takes now get explicit `takeClassification` and `classificationReason`; critical REC consensus flags route to `qc_fail/`; false-roll flags route to `false_roll/`; warning-only issues such as SDI dropout remain in `takes/` with QC metadata. Sidecar filenames now follow the final folder name, clip-level QC flags are populated, and manifest rollup scans all sort folders. `swift build` passed. Hardware/OCR validation: record 9/9, 8/9, 1/9, and middle partial patterns, then inspect folder placement, per-take `data.json`, and `manifest.json`. False-roll routing still needs the operator action from card 13.

cards.title: Alarm Controller and Acknowledgement Model

fields.Current note: Initial alarm model landed in `cebfcdd`. Critical REC/sync/genlock alarms are sticky, drive grid-cell visuals plus the Operator Console REC-pill alarm text, and trigger beep + AVFoundation TTS. Warning-only metadata such as clip mismatch and SDI dropout stays quiet/log-only. Operator Console now has a Silence Audio action that stops current TTS without clearing visual state. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Operator/audio review: verify alarm wording, sound level, silence behavior, and whether additional alarm classes should be loud or visual-only.

cards.summary: Initial alarm model landed in `cebfcdd`. Critical REC/sync/genlock alarms are sticky, drive grid-cell visuals plus the Operator Console REC-pill alarm text, and trigger beep + AVFoundation TTS. Warning-only metadata such as clip mismatch and SDI dropout stays quiet/log-only. Operator Console now has a Silence Audio action that stops current TTS without clearing visual state. `swift build` passed. Operator/audio review: verify alarm wording, sound level, silence behavior, and whether additional alarm classes should be loud or visual-only.

cards.title: Minimal TC Source Status and Degraded-TC Marking

fields.Current note: Minimal TC status service landed in `c016972`. The router now tracks the best observed timing source, and per-take sidecars store start/end `TimecodeStatus` with source, confidence, certified/degraded flags, primary slot/camera, display TC, frame count, and detail. Current AVFoundation/file-playback paths are explicitly degraded/approximate until RP188 providers land. Operator Console Timecode readiness copy now reflects non-certified/degraded modes. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Validate sidecar output on a short playback take; later cards still need DeckLink/RP188 capture, failover, and embedded QuickTime `tmcd`.

cards.summary: Minimal TC status service landed in `c016972`. The router now tracks the best observed timing source, and per-take sidecars store start/end `TimecodeStatus` with source, confidence, certified/degraded flags, primary slot/camera, display TC, frame count, and detail. Current AVFoundation/file-playback paths are explicitly degraded/approximate until RP188 providers land. Operator Console Timecode readiness copy now reflects non-certified/degraded modes. `swift build` passed. Validate sidecar output on a short playback take; later cards still need DeckLink/RP188 capture, failover, and embedded QuickTime `tmcd`.

cards.title: Open Record Folder Action

fields.Current note: Implemented in `75d82cb`. The Operator Console project summary now has an Open Record Folder action that ensures the project layout exists and opens the current project root containing `takes/`, `qc_fail/`, and `false_roll/`. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: App smoke verification: click the action in Working Mode and confirm Finder opens the active project folder.

cards.summary: Implemented in `75d82cb`. The Operator Console project summary now has an Open Record Folder action that ensures the project layout exists and opens the current project root containing `takes/`, `qc_fail/`, and `false_roll/`. `swift build` passed. App smoke verification: click the action in Working Mode and confirm Finder opens the active project folder.

cards.title: Authoritative Roll/Clip OCR Take Identity

fields.Why ready: Slices landed in `fca62f6`, `c5fff9e`, and `984b1a6`: Overlay/QC has a Clip Sync report action, unreadable/mismatched OCR is logged as non-loud `CLIP_MISMATCH`, clip-sync readiness persists into Overlay/QC rows, and production take renaming now requires at least 5 matching stable OCR cameras. If consensus fails, the take keeps its interim folder and gets a sidecar QC flag.
fields.Definition of done: Hardware/OCR validation with real overlays: prove OCR reaches 5/9+ reliably, tune ROI/Vision settings if needed, and then carry clip-sync status into daily reports.

cards.summary: Hardware/OCR validation with real overlays: prove OCR reaches 5/9+ reliably, tune ROI/Vision settings if needed, and then carry clip-sync status into daily reports.

cards.title: Live 9-Grid Recording/Alarm Overlays

fields.Why ready: Alarm controller and REC consensus foundations are now in place. The remaining work is visual treatment on the primary 9-grid monitoring surface.
fields.Definition of done: 9-grid shows red REC outlines/bugs for recording cameras and orange/yellow warning overlays by camera without recording app-only overlays into clean assets unless explicitly enabled.

cards.summary: 9-grid shows red REC outlines/bugs for recording cameras and orange/yellow warning overlays by camera without recording app-only overlays into clean assets unless explicitly enabled.

cards.title: Independent Recorder Health and Protected 9-Grid Fallback

fields.Why ready: Take lifecycle sorting and alarm model are in place, so recorder-health errors can route to operator alarms and sidecar metadata.
fields.Definition of done: Live Stitch and 9-grid recorders are independently monitored; if stitch recording fails, 9-grid remains protected and the take metadata clearly records fallback status.

cards.summary: Live Stitch and 9-grid recorders are independently monitored; if stitch recording fails, 9-grid remains protected and the take metadata clearly records fallback status.

cards.title: Late Stop and False Roll Flows

fields.Why ready: Take lifecycle routing and alarm silence behavior are in place.
fields.Definition of done: Late-stop cameras create `CAMERA_STOPPED_LATE` warning metadata while the original take can stay good; false-roll operator action moves the take to `false_roll/`.

cards.summary: Late-stop cameras create `CAMERA_STOPPED_LATE` warning metadata while the original take can stay good; false-roll operator action moves the take to `false_roll/`.

cards.title: Setup Test Recording Sandbox

fields.Why ready: Setup Mode and Working Mode exist, and closed-take classification no longer depends on writing everything into one folder.
fields.Definition of done: Setup Mode records into setup-test naming/folders, can be cleared when entering Working Mode, and does not pollute production take manifests unless explicitly kept.

cards.summary: Setup Mode records into setup-test naming/folders, can be cleared when entering Working Mode, and does not pollute production take manifests unless explicitly kept.

suggested_next_pulls: Implement card 14's Setup Test Recording Sandbox so setup rolls stay out of production takes.
Validate cards 8, 9, 10, 15, and 16 in-app/on-array: OCR consensus, folder routing, sidecars, alarms, degraded TC metadata, and Finder folder opening.
Prepare card 17 DeckLink/RP188 capture provider once hardware is connected for certification.
Get operator/hardware signoff on cards 5, 6, and 7 with the physical array connected.
acceptance_gates: Setup Mode and Working Mode are explicit and visually distinct.
Default PTGui template loads for every job and active template is recorded.
Mapping and ROI/overlay verification are usable in Setup Mode.
REC consensus uses 500 ms and classifies 9/9, 8/9, 1/9, and middle partial patterns.
Roll/clip OCR drives production take identity.
Take sidecars and manifest update after every closed Working Mode take.
9-grid and Live Stitch recording health are visible and independent.
Degraded/non-certified TC status is visible and persisted.
